Industries/ Sectors

A dynamic and results-oriented Multimedia Manager and Content Creator with
over 9 years of experience in graphic design, motion graphics, branding, and
marketing.


Skilled in leading creative teams to develop innovative visual strategies for
global brands. Proficient in a wide range of design software, including Adobe
Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere), and well-
versed in 3D design, web design, and content creation.


Passionate about delivering high-quality design solutions that align with business
goals and elevate brand presence in competitive markets. Experienced working
with clients in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt.
